title: daggle DAG definition
description: Schema for daggle YAML DAG workflow definitions

trigger.description: Trigger configuration for automated DAG execution. Multiple triggers can coexist — any matching trigger starts a run.

overlap.description: What to do when a trigger fires while the DAG is already running (default: skip)

deadline.description: HH:MM deadline time. If the DAG has not started by this time, the on_deadline hook fires (alert only, does not trigger the DAG). Uses system timezone.

on_deadline.description: Hook to fire when the DAG misses its deadline

on_dag.description: Trigger when another DAG completes or fails

pass_outputs.description: Pass upstream DAG outputs as env vars

condition.description: Trigger when an R expression or shell command succeeds

git.description: Trigger on new git commits or tags

workdir.description: Working directory override for all steps

max_parallel.description: Maximum number of steps allowed to run concurrently. 0 (default) means unbounded.

r_version.description: R version constraint (e.g. '>=4.1.0'). Warns if not satisfied; use r_version_strict to fail.

r_version_strict.description: If true, fail the DAG when the R version constraint is not met (default: false, warn only)

env.description: Environment variables available to all steps. Values can be plain strings or objects with value + secret fields.

secret.description: If true, value is redacted in logs and status output

params.description: Parameters with optional defaults, overridable via CLI

steps.description: Ordered list of steps to execute

hook.description: Lifecycle hook — an R expression or shell command

path.description: Path to content directory or file

name.description: Content name on Connect (defaults to directory name)

database.description: Run a SQL query via R DBI and write the result set to disk

driver.description: Database driver (maps to RPostgres, RMariaDB, RSQLite, duckdb, or odbc)

params.description: Named args passed to dbConnect() (e.g. dbname, host, user, password, dsn)

query.description: Inline SQL query (mutually exclusive with query_file)

query_file.description: Path to a .sql file, relative to workdir (mutually exclusive with query)

output.description: Output path; format inferred from extension (.csv, .tsv, .rds, .parquet, .feather)

approve.description: Approval gate — pauses execution until a human approves or rejects

timeout.description: How long to wait for approval before failing (e.g. '24h')

notify.description: Hook to notify reviewers (e.g. Slack, email)

call.description: Sub-DAG composition — execute another DAG as a step

dag.description: Name of another DAG to execute

pin.description: Publish data or models via the pins R package

board.description: Pin board type (connect, s3, local, azure)

object.description: Path to the object file to pin

type.description: Object type (rds, csv, parquet, arrow, json)

vetiver.description: MLOps model versioning and deployment via vetiver

action.description: Whether to version (pin) or deploy the model

model.description: Path to model file (for pin action)

condition.description: A condition expressed as an R expression or shell command

step.description: A single execution unit. Exactly one step type field must be set.

script.description: Path to R script (runs via Rscript)

quarto.description: Path to Quarto document or project (runs quarto render)

test.description: Run package tests via devtools::test(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

check.description: Run R CMD check via rcmdcheck. Value is package path or '.' for current directory

document.description: Generate docs via roxygen2::roxygenize(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

lint.description: Run linter via lintr::lint_package(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

style.description: Format code via styler::style_pkg(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

rmd.description: Render R Markdown document via rmarkdown::render(). Value is path to .Rmd file

renv_restore.description: Restore renv library via renv::restore(). Value is project path or '.' for current directory

coverage.description: Measure code coverage via covr::package_coverage(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

validate.description: Run a data validation R script via Rscript. Value is path to validation script

shinytest.description: Run Shiny app tests via shinytest2::test_app(). Value is app directory path

pkgdown.description: Build package website via pkgdown::build_site(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

install.description: Install R packages via pak or install.packages(). Value is package name or path

targets.description: Run targets pipeline via targets::tar_make(). Value is project path or '.' for current directory

benchmark.description: Run bench scripts from a directory. Value is path to benchmark directory

revdepcheck.description: Run reverse dependency checks via revdepcheck::revdep_check(). Value is package path or '.' for current directory

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the step

depends.description: IDs of steps that must complete before this step runs

output_dir.description: Output directory for rendered reports. Supports {{ .Matrix.* }} template variables for parameterized naming.

output_name.description: Output filename for rendered reports. Supports {{ .Matrix.* }} template variables for parameterized naming.

when.description: Conditional execution — skip step if condition is false

preconditions.description: Health checks that must pass before the step runs

matrix.description: Parameter grid — step is expanded into one instance per combination

max_parallel.description: Maximum parallel instances for matrix expansion

error_on.description: Error sensitivity for R steps (default: error). 'warning' treats R warnings as failures, 'message' treats R messages as failures.

cache.description: Enable step-level caching. When true, daggle hashes step inputs and skips execution if unchanged.

freshness.description: Source freshness / data SLA checks. daggle verifies file modification times before running the step.

path.description: Path to the input file (relative to workdir)

max_age.description: Maximum acceptable age as a Go duration (e.g. '6h', '30m')

artifacts.description: Output files produced by this step. daggle verifies they exist, computes hashes, and records metadata.

name.description: Unique artifact name within the step

format.description: File format hint (e.g. parquet, rds, csv, png)

versioned.description: If true, append epoch timestamp to filename to avoid overwrites
